ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the test section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test section */,
  "section_type" TEXT /* Type of test section (e.g., functional, performance, security) */,
  "parent_section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent section (for hierarchical sections) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the section the test case belongs to */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_case_type" TEXT /* Type of test case (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES test_sections ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the step belongs to */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_expected_result" TEXT /* Expected result of the step */,
  "step_status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., passed, failed, not tested) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_steps_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., Not Tested, Failed, Passed) */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment where the test was executed */,
  "ran_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  "ran_date" TEXT /* Date the test was executed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the test execution */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test case in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_ran_by FOREIGN KEY ("ran_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environments ("test_environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test environment */,
  "hardware_config" TEXT /* Hardware configuration of the test environment */,
  "software_config" TEXT /* Software configuration of the test environment */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of test environment (e.g., physical, virtual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., test manager, tester, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., admin, tester, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case where the bug was found */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bug report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved, Reopened) */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was reported */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the bug */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the bug was resolved */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the bug resolution */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Created, Updated, Deleted) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_history_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., image, document, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_attachments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "reply_to_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_comments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that depends on another test case */,
  "dependent_test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being depended on */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., hard, soft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_dependencies_dependent_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_dependencies_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., functional, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_tags_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ci_cd_pipelines" (
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pipeline */,
  "pipeline_name" TEXT /* Name of the pipeline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pipeline */,
  "pipeline_type" TEXT /* Type of pipeline (e.g., build, deployment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pipeline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_pipeline_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being mapped */,
  "pipeline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pipeline being mapped */,
  "mapping_type" TEXT /* Type of mapping (e.g., build, deployment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_pipeline_mapping_pipeline_id FOREIGN KEY ("pipeline_id") REFERENCES ci_cd_pipelines ("pipeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_pipeline_mapping_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)
